top_signals.title: U.S. tariff threats give Lula a new election attack on Bolsonaro
top_signals.summary: The move handed the Brazilian President a ready-made line of attack against his main challenger ahead of an election that polls suggest will be close.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
